summary: Created a concise M2 prototype map fixture source policy that keeps M2 map data synthetic, defines historicity label requirements, blocks real historical/cultural map claims without a separate task, records later provenance expectations, and limits bad-map fixtures to validation use.

tests_run.result: Showed this task's modified task JSON, new docs/research directory, and new handoff file, plus pre-existing unrelated coordination changes in project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, and an untracked route message.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001
tests_run.result: OK task shape M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 REVIEW historical_researcher -> qa_reviewer

decisions: M2 prototype map fixture data should default to FICTIONAL and remain synthetic unless a separate historical research/content task authorizes formal historical map content.
Bad-map fixtures are validation data only and must not become production, tutorial, screenshot, or narrative placeholder content.
risks: The policy intentionally does not decide exact historical geography, named settlements, polity claims, or cultural symbols; later content tasks still require source and claim records.
Pre-existing unrelated coordination-state changes remain in the worktree and were not modified by this task.
requested_action: Review the M2 map fixture source policy for scope discipline, historical/cultural guardrails, provenance expectations, and handoff/test evidence.
